Create a modern React web application with the following specifications:

Technical Stack Requirements:
- React with JavaScript
- Vite as build tool and development server
- ES Modules for code organization
- Shadcn UI for component library
- TanStack Query (react-query) for data fetching and caching
- TanStack Router for routing
- Recoil for global state management
- @uidotdev/usehooks for utility hooks
- Tailwind CSS for styling

Authentication Features:
1. User Registration
   - Email/password registration with validation
   - Google OAuth integration
   - Phone number verification
   - Consent checkbox required

2. Account Management
   - Email confirmation flow
   - Password management (reset, forgot, change)
   - Secure login with JWT (access/refresh tokens)
   - Token refresh mechanism
   - Logout functionality

3. Security Requirements
   - HTTP-only cookies for token storage
   - Protected routes implementation
   - Input validation and sanitization
   - Error handling for all auth scenarios

API Integration:
- RESTful authentication endpoints provided
- Swagger/OpenAPI documented endpoints
- Error response handling (400, 401, 404, 422)
- Success response handling (200, 201)

Documentation Access:
- Utilize Shadcn MCP server for component documentation
- Access Context7 MCP server for package documentation

Additional Requirements:
- Implement responsive design
- Follow security best practices
- Handle loading and error states
- Maintain consistent UI/UX
- Support internationalization for phone numbers
- Keep UI clean and minimalistic mostly using Shadcn components with minimal custom styling specifically for colors adjustments

Please provide a production-ready implementation following these specifications while adhering to React and modern web development best practices.
